name: Discover Instagram posts by hashtag with engagement scoring

nodes.name: Scrape Instagram posts via Apify API
nodes.notes:
NOTE: Instagram's private API blocks unauthenticated requests.
For production use, replace this node with:
  • Apify Instagram Hashtag Scraper actor
  • RapidAPI Instagram Scraper
  • Your own authenticated session cookies
See README comment in 'Parse Posts' node for cookie auth approach.

parameters.content:
## Discover Instagram posts by hashtag with engagement scoring

### How it works

1. Triggers a daily schedule to check for trending Instagram posts by hashtag.
2. Loads the configured hashtags to monitor.
3. Scrapes Instagram posts using the Apify API.
4. Extracts and processes the post data, removing empty responses.
5. Calculates engagement scores, then sends a report to Telegram and saves data to Airtable.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure the daily schedule trigger to set the desired time for checking posts.
- [ ] Set hashtags in the 'Load monitoring hashtags' node.
- [ ] Ensure Apify API credentials are configured in the 'Scrape Instagram posts via Apify API' node.
- [ ] Set up Telegram credentials in the 'Send engagement report to Telegram' node.
- [ ] Set Airtable credentials in the 'Save results to Airtable database' node.

### Customization

You can adjust the engagement score formula in the 'Calculate engagement score and rank' node.

## Scheduled hashtag check

Triggers a daily schedule to load hashtags for monitoring.

## Scrape Instagram data

Fetches Instagram posts using Apify API after loading hashtags.

## Process and filter data

Extracts and normalizes post data, then removes empty responses.

## Calculate and save scores

Calculates engagement scores, formats HTML reports, sends to Telegram, and saves to Airtable.

main.node: Scrape Instagram posts via Apify API
